scripts.bump: changeset version && find . -path ./node_modules -prune -o -path ./CHANGELOG.md -prune -o -name CHANGELOG.md -print -exec rm {} + && rm bun.lock && bun install && bun run lint:fix
scripts.clean: rm -rf lib/dist types/dist app/server/dist app/web/dist cli/dist sdk/*/dist sdk/adapter/*/dist sdk/iam/dist
scripts.build:sdk: bun run --cwd sdk/workflow build && bun run --cwd sdk/client build && bun run --cwd sdk/worker build && bun run --cwd sdk/endpoint build && bun run --cwd sdk/server build && bun run --cwd sdk/iam build && bun run --cwd sdk/adapter/http build && bun run --cwd sdk/adapter/redis build
scripts.release: bun run build:lib && bun run build:types && bun run build:sdk && bun run build:cli && bun run release:publish && git tag v$(bun -e "console.log(require('./types/package.json').version)") && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:publish: for pkg in types sdk/workflow sdk/client sdk/adapter/redis sdk/worker sdk/endpoint sdk/server sdk/iam cli; do (cd $pkg && bun publish --access public) || true; done
